message:
feat(tests): add dataset registry for E2E/conformance fixtures

- KnownDataset enum for registered test datasets
- DatasetRegistry for scanning and integrity verification
- IsolatedDataset for safe temp workspace copies
- DatasetMetadata capturing issue counts, sizes, hashes
- Source datasets are never mutated; copies only

Closes beads_rust-x7z8
